title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.181 - Expedited eligibility process, pregnant women
text:
208.181.  Expedited eligibility process, pregnant women. — The department of social services shall develop an expedited eligibility process for pregnant women for medical assistance benefits.  The expedited process shall be in place no later than January 1, 1994.
(L. 1993 H.B. 564 § 26)
